overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through an autumn landscape toward a wooden cabin, then sitting by a campfire. The scene features golden hour lighting with warm tones and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with scattered autumn trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant cabin, passing through tall grass

small rustic wooden shack with metal chimney visible on the horizon
dense trees with orange and yellow fall foliage
dense trees with orange and yellow fall foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open grassland during golden hour. Deer graze briefly to the right before disappearing into the autumn-colored forest. A wooden cabin sits in the distance ahead, surrounded by fall foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead with wooden cabin and outbuildings

events.description: entering the homestead area, passing the wooden wagon parked beside the cabin

agents.ego_description: walking around the cabin toward the campfire area in the yard

entered.detail: old wooden wagon with canvas cover parked beside the cabin
wooden fence enclosing the homestead property
stone well structure with wooden cover near the cabin
campfire with smoke rising in the yard ahead
simple wooden bench near the fire pit

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden cabin and walks past a parked wagon on the left. The path curves around the cabin toward a campfire with smoke rising. A stone well stands to the right as the character nears the fire pit area.

events.description: character stops walking and sits down by the campfire
NPC character walks past in the background carrying an object

agents.ego_description: sitting by the campfire, tending to the flames while the camera orbits around

notable_agents.action: person walking past the cabin carrying something on their shoulder

entered.detail: circle of stones surrounding the campfire pit

segments.scene_description: The character sits down by the stone-ringed campfire as the camera slowly orbits around. An NPC walks past in the background. The wooden cabin remains visible to the left while the character tends to the fire, with game UI indicating crafting options.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open autumn grassland toward the intimate warmth of a woodland campsite. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path during the golden hour, passing grazing deer that vanish into a forest of fall foliage as a distant wooden cabin comes into view. As the character approaches the residence, the camera glides past a parked wagon and curves around the cabin, moving past a stone well toward a smoldering campfire. The scene then shifts to a slow orbit around the character as they sit by the stone-ringed fire, with the cabin remaining in the background while an NPC walks past. Finally, the focus settles on the character tending to the flames, with crafting options appearing on the screen.
